channel.title: podo/awesome-framer Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Motion is Emotion: Prototyping Microinteractions for Apple Watch with Framer Studio - Apple Watch temperature gauge prototype tutorial.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Modules

  • FramerMapboxJSstars46 - Another module to integrate Mapbox maps on your Framer prototypes.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Apr 16th - Apr 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • How to Create High‑Quality GIFs - How to Create High‑Quality GIFs, our guide to making amazing GIFs with some of our favorite tools: ScreenFlow and Claquette.

    • Modules

  • Framer StatusBarLayerstars53 - Module for generating accurate, customizable status bars for iOS app prototypes.
  • framer keyboardEventsstars10 - Hassle-free keyboard bindings for Framer: No need to look up keyCodes; supports 100+ keys with minimal performance impact.
  • Framer Joystickstars15 - Module for Gamepad-driven UI prototypes.
  • Framer Feedbackstars20 - Framer feedback module makes it easier for you to prototype with feedback messages.
  • Framer-Bottom-Navigationstars8 - Framer Module to add Android's Bottom Navigation to your project.
  • Framer Device Rotatorstars1 - A Framer module that adds a rotation button to a phone/tablet when said is displayed in a desktop browser or in Framer Studio (but not on device).
  • Keyboard Input for Framerstars10 - A module that allows you to easily manage keyboard input.
  • Framer DesignComponentsstars30 - Module for converting your designs in design mode into full scalable classes in code, without a single line of code!.
  • Framer Web Audio API Modulestars6 - A Framer module that provides better audio support for your Framer projects.
  • Framer Status Bar Modulestars2 - Module to initialize a status bar in a Framer application.
  • Framer Android Pickerstars7 - An Android Picker Module.
  • Yummy Framerstars2 - Yummy provides custom layer functions such as LoadViews, LoadNextView, Fade & Move Layer.
  • Framer Font Loaderstars30 - Painlessly, reliably load local and web fonts into Framer prototypes.
  • Framer Formstars106 - Give your Framer prototypes a third dimension.

    • UI Libraries

  • Frameworkstars30 - A general-purpose component kit for Framer.

    • Other

  • iOS Kit - Readymade elements for starting your next iOS app. Direct link.
  • Android Kit - Material Design elements for your next Android app. Direct link.
  • Web Kit - All the elements you’ll need to start your next web project. Direct link.
  • Wireframe Kit - Basic wireframe elements to blueprint your next big project. Direct link.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

  • lottie-framerstars171 - Framer module that uses AirBnb's Lottie-Web to render animations exported from After Effects (JSON files).

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
UI Libraries

  • iOS 11 iPhone GUIstars96 - Templates of GUI elements found in the public release of iOS 11.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Video Courses

  • Framer Studio for Beginners: A Comprehensive Guide - Series of videos that walk you through designing and coding in Framer using hands-on projects by Cordova Putra

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

  • iOS-11-Framerstars43 - iOS 11 Design System GUI for Framer.
  • framer-moreutilsstars31 - Expand Utils with some handy helper functions.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Jan 1st - Jan 7th, 2018
item.description:
Examples

  • Framer Experiments by Ed Chao - Several awesome examples with download links from designer at Dropbox.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • framer-Symbolsstars118 - Module to create symbols in Framer.

    • Other

  • framer-modulesstars338 - Discover, install and save your favorite modules at one place.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Oct 30th - Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • Framer Sliderstars42 - Module that allows you to design sliders and then bring them to life, without losing customizability. Appearance and logic—separated.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • FramerAudiostars47 — Module that allows you to design audio interfaces in Framer.
  • Framer Sheetstars17 - Import information from Google Sheets into Framer.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Other

  • Fiber - A free interactive UI kit with 15 screens.
  • Voyage - A free travel-themed UI kit that’s fully interactive and made for Framer.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Oct 2nd - Oct 8th, 2017
item.description:
Video Courses

  • designers.how Framer Courses - List of basic and more advanced Framer courses.

    • Other

  • framer-bootstrapstars31 - Use Framer Library in your preferred editor and environment.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Video Courses

  • Framer Crash Course - Crash course learning the basics of design and code on Framer.

    • Modules

  • GradientHelperstars21 - Module that simplifies the process of applying gradients to Framer layers and even enables animated gradients.
  • FocusEnginestars23 - Module for simulating the grid focus behavior found on Apple TV and Roku.
  • MapboxLayerstars19 - Module for creating powerful Mapbox maps in your prototypes.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • Loading Placeholderstars16 - Module which instantly creates loading placeholder based on your layer style.
  • ControlPanelLayerstars34 - Framer module for creating a developer panel to control aspects of the prototype from within the prototype.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • The Framer book by Tes Mat

    • Video Courses

  • Framer for UX Design - Emmanuel Henri shows both how to use non-coding Framer tools and how the usage of programming fits into the UX design process.

    • Modules

  • framer-QueryInterfacestars27 - Module that allows Framer prototypes to read variables from and write variables to the last part of their URL (the query).

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017
item.description:
General

  • Official Site
  • Official Examples
  • Documentation
  • Facebook Group

    • Articles

  • Designer / coder, and not the other way around - Paul Cotton talks how he started using Framer.
  • Why Framer.js Matters - Pedro Carmo on why Framer is a tool designers should start using.

    • Videos

  • FORM SF 2014: Panel - Design Tooling - Discussion between creators of popular design tools (including Koen Bok from Framer) on the value of prototyping, lessons learned in crafting products for designers, and the future of UX tools.

    • Tutorials

  • Framer.js Official Basics - The place to start prototyping with Framer.
  • Framer Video Tutorials - Video tutorials provided directly from Framer team.
  • New to Framer? Just 3 Things to Get You Started - David Lee’s guide to get started.
  • Framer.js for people who think things like Framer.js are weird and hard - Sean Mateer makes weird and hard things look easy.
  • Prototyping & Working with Framer - Simple guide to getting started by Dan Moore.
  • Prototyping with Framer.js - Framer basics by Tackmobile team.
  • Getting Started with Framer - Very basic Framer starting guide by Andrew Nalband.
  • Building Your First Prototype - Second guide by Andrew Nalband, where you start building real prototype from Sketch file.
  • Creating Your First Prototype with Framer - Animation tutorial by Kenny Chen.
  • Framer.js Workshop - Collection of Framer examples by Jay Stakelon.
  • Periscope Heart Animation Demo at the Seattle FramerJS Meetup - Presentation by Jordan Dobson on how to create Periscope heart animation with Framer.
  • Using Parse to power up your Framer prototypes - Using Framer with real data Part 1 by George Kedenburg III.
  • Give your Framer prototypes a better memory - Using Framer with real data Part 2 by George Kedenburg III.
  • Working with SVG Paths in Framer - Starting point for SVG Paths in Framer by Josh Puckett.
  • Managing Styles and CSS in Framer - Mårten Björk on styles management in Framer.
  • Developing a Framer Module - John Marstall teaches how to create a Framer Module.
  • Prototyping for Virtual Reality using Framer JS - Excerpts of some interaction considerations Keyur Jain learned of while prototyping for a Virtual Reality experience in Framer.
  • Prototyping Speech Recognition in Framer.js - Brian Bailey gives a breaf introduction to speach recognition prototyping in Framer.
  • Power your Framer prototypes with real location data - Maya Gao on Framer prototypes with real location data using Mapbox API.

    • Video Courses

  • Mobile App Prototyping: Designing Custom Interactions - 50-minute Skillshare class on how to use mobile app prototyping to communicate your ideas and execute your vision by Noah Levin.
  • Framerjs: Innovative prototyping and design with interaction - 54 parts, 6 hours course by Adria Jimenez.
  • Prototyping with Framer - Three-part prototyping course by Rafael Conde.
  • Rapid Prototyping with Framer - 5-hour long prototyping course by Kenny Chen.
  • Prototyping With Framer.js - On-location course instructed by Jay Stakelon, Noah Levin and Cemre Güngör.
  • UI Prototyping with Framer.js - Almost 5 hours long course by Jay Stakelon.
  • Framercasts - Advance your Framer knowledge with real world examples produced by Mike Johnson.

    • Examples

  • HSL Color Picker - HSL Color Picker by Framer team.
  • iOS Toggle - iOS Toggle using Color class by Jorn van Dijk.

    • Modules

  • framer-googlefontsstars62 - Google Fonts loader module for your Framer prototypes.
  • tabBarModulestars94 - Module for Framer that replicates the iOS tab bar.
  • framer-animation-collectionsstars65 - Framer classes for managing large sets of animations.
  • framer.iosnotificationstars22 - Framer module that mimics an iOS notification.
  • Framer-Gridstars24 - Flexible Framer Module that creates a grid overlay on top of your prototype to precisely align content or experiment early on in the design process.
  • shortcuts-for-framerstars416 - Collection of useful functions to make mobile prototyping with Framer easier.
  • RippleTransition.framerstars4 - Framer Module for a Material design like ripple transition.
  • framer-iconstars28 - Framer dynamically tinted icons based off of a template image.
  • framer.makeGradientstars21 - Module for Framer that makes it easy to create static linear/radial gradients. Want them to animate? I welcome pull requests.
  • WatchKit-Framerstars55 - Apple Watch Kit module for Framer.
  • Framer-VideoPlayerstars75 - Video player module for Framer Studio and Framer.
  • Framer-Module-ShakeEventstars62 - ShakeEvent Module for Framer.
  • Framer-Module-UISoundstars32 - UISound Module for Framer.
  • CameraLayerstars84 - Framer layer displaying camera image.
  • ios-keyboard-for-framerstars31 - iOS Keyboard module for Framer.
  • textLayer-for-Framerstars258 - Framer module that simplifies the process of adding text to your prototypes.
  • framer-flip-card-modulestars96 - Framer module to quickly create a flip card effect with two image layers.
  • StickyHeaders-for-Framerstars108 - Module to create scroll components with sticky stamps in Framer.
  • OrientationEventsstars102 - Module for Framer to handle device orientation events.
  • ScaleFramestars8 - Module for Framer to calculate properties of a scaled layer using its new dimensions.
  • framer-labelstars11 - Label module with multi-line truncation support for Framer.
  • framer-colour-transitionstars10 - Framer module that transitions the background colour of a layer.
  • framer-webviewstars24 - Web view module for Framer.
  • framer-uistatusbarstars2 - iOS status bar module for Framer.
  • framer.module.ajaxstars21 - Ajax module for Framer.
  • framer.module.fillstars6 - Fill module for Framer.
  • Comment-for-Framerstars18 - Framer module for making comments in your prototypes.
  • framer-viewNavigationControllerstars220 - Simple controller for FramerJS that allows you to transition between views with just a couple lines of code.
  • Layers-for-Framerstars37 - Framer module that makes it easier to find layers in your project.
  • Framer-Highlightrstars27 - Custom Framer module that shows hotspots over clickable layers in your prototype.
  • SVGLayer - Module and corresponding Sketch plugin that make it trivial to work with SVG Paths in Framer.
  • VRComponentstars182 - Virtual reality component for Framer.
  • 3D Touch Module - Module for iOS 3D Touch support by Jordan Dobson.
  • Simple Android Ripplestars31 - Framer module for adding touch ripple animations to any layer.
  • Simple Android Snackbarstars3 - Framer module for adding Android Material Design Snackbars to your project.
  • Framer Pathstars148 - Create custom SVG shapes and animate each point individually.
  • Material Kit for FramerJSstars267 - Make prototyping with Material Design fast and easy without compromising the quality or customization.
  • iOS Kit for FramerJSstars533 - Make prototyping for iOS fast and easy without compromising the quality or customization.
  • spotifyApiFramerstars9 - Framer module that allows to get JSON objects when querying with Spotify API.
  • ViewController-for-Framerstars427 - Module for Framer helps you create multi step user flows with pre-made transitions like "fade in", "zoom in" and "slide in".
  • Gridddlestars53 - Grid module for FramerJS.
  • SliderLibrary - Framer library for creating sliders.
  • StickyHeaders-for-Framerstars108 - Module to enable sticky headers within Framer's Scroll Components.
  • framer-view-stackstars24 - Framer module for creating views that stack on top of each other.
  • Pairstars39 - Drag and Drop module for Framer.

    • Sites

  • Prototyping With Framer - Blog by Kenny Chen with lots of great examples, tutorials.
  • Framer Code - Collection of Framer modules, code examples, snippets and tips.

    • Other

  • Framer Snippetsstars490 - Library of Framer snippets to help speed up workflow.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • Cloudstitch Framer Modulestars15 - Module lets you load data from Google Spreadsheets and Microsoft Excel directly into your Framer projects.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Jan 2nd - Jan 8th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • RemoteLayerstars30 - The RemoteLayer module allows you to instantly generate an interactive Apple TV remote for your tvOS app prototypes.
  • distribute-layersstars89 - This package helps you position multiple Framer layers with ease.
  • Framer-ValueLayerstars63 - ValueLayer is a Layer subclass dedicated to helping you manage numbers in your prototypes, and animate between them.
  • perspective-viewstars40 - Module for FramerJS to enable a perspective view of your prototype.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • Stripe Speaker Series: Designing with Framer - Koen Bok and Jorn van Dijk give a short talk and Q&A focused on Framer that also covers prototyping in general and a discussion of the various design tools available in the market.

    • Other

  • Stitchstars144 - Lightweight framework for adding interaction to your Framer prototypes directly from your Sketch designs.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer May 30th - Jun 5th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

  • framer-Firebasestars232 - The Firebase module allows your Framer prototype to load, save and sync data effortlessly between multiple sessions and devices.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2015
item.description:
Modules

  • Simple Android Keyboardsstars8 - Easily add a static Android Keyboard to your Framer Studio project with just one line of code.
  • Simple Android Toaststars3 - Use this module to easily add Android toasts to your Framer Studio projects.

item.title: podo/awesome-framer Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2015
item.description:
Books

  • CoffeeScript for Framer by Tessa Thornton

    • Modules

  • framer.placeholdstars10 - This is a module for framer that provides a library of different image placeholder services.
  • FramerNavigationComponentstars29 - Reusable and customizable navigation component for Framer, based on iOS.
  • Framer-AudioPlayerstars146 - AudioPlayer Module for Framer.
  • Kineticsstars29 - Test spring animations on any layer in your Framer Studio project without having to reload.
  • Input-Framerstars341 - Framer module to easily turn your designs inputs into real inputs.
  • framer-equally-rotate-imagesstars37 - Give this module an array of images, and it will rotate them equally around in a circular path.
  • SpeechSynthstars12 - Framer module for Web SpeechSynthesis.
